result.stdout:
PackagingTools CLI

Commands:
  pack      Build packaging artifacts.
  host      Configure Windows host integration metadata.
  identity  Manage identity tokens (login).
  packagingtools identity login [identity options]

Usage:
  packagingtools pack --project <file> --platform <windows|mac|linux> [options]
  packagingtools host --project <file> [host options]

Pack Options:
  --project <path>          Path to project definition JSON file
  --platform <name>         Target platform
  --format <value>          Requested format (repeatable)
  --configuration <value>   Build configuration (default Release)
  --output <path>           Output directory (default ./artifacts)
  --property key=value      Provider property override
  --save-project <path>     Persist updated project after run
    Remote signing properties: windows.signing.azureKeyVaultCertificate, windows.signing.azureKeyVaultUrl
    Local signing properties: windows.signing.certificatePath, windows.signing.password

Host Options:
  --project <path>                    Path to project definition JSON file
  --enable-shortcut|--disable-shortcut
  --shortcut-name <value>
  --shortcut-target <value>
  --shortcut-description <value>
  --shortcut-icon <value>
  --enable-protocol|--disable-protocol
  --protocol-name <value>
  --protocol-display-name <value>
  --protocol-command <value>
  --enable-file-association|--disable-file-association
  --file-extension <value>
  --file-progid <value>
  --file-description <value>
  --file-command <value>
  --apply                             Persist changes (default previews only)
  --save-project <path>               Optional override path when applying

Identity Login Options:
  --provider <name>        Identity provider (azuread|okta|local, default azuread)
  --scope <value>          Requested scope (repeatable)
  --require-mfa            Require MFA for the login session
  --tenant <value>         Azure AD tenant id
  --client-id <value>      Azure AD client id
  --domain <value>         Okta domain
  --username <value>       Username or UPN
  --display-name <value>   Friendly display name override
  --email <value>          Email override
  --roles <value>          Comma-separated role list
  --organization <value>   Okta organization name
  --mfa-code <value>       MFA verification code

  --project <path>                    Path to project definition JSON file
  --enable-shortcut|--disable-shortcut
  --shortcut-name <value>
  --shortcut-target <value>
  --shortcut-description <value>
  --shortcut-icon <value>
  --enable-protocol|--disable-protocol
  --protocol-name <value>
  --protocol-display-name <value>
  --protocol-command <value>
  --enable-file-association|--disable-file-association
  --file-extension <value>
  --file-progid <value>
  --file-description <value>
  --file-command <value>
  --apply                             Persist changes (default previews only)
  --save-project <path>               Optional override path when applying

Identity Login Options:
  --provider <name>        Identity provider (azuread|okta|local, default azuread)
  --scope <value>          Requested scope (repeatable)
  --require-mfa            Require MFA for the login session
  --tenant <value>         Azure AD tenant id
  --client-id <value>      Azure AD client id
  --domain <value>         Okta domain
  --username <value>       Username or UPN
  --display-name <value>   Friendly display name override
  --email <value>          Email override
  --roles <value>          Comma-separated role list
  --organization <value>   Okta organization name
  --mfa-code <value>       MFA verification code

commands.payload:
PackagingTools CLI

Commands:
  pack      Build packaging artifacts.
  host      Configure Windows host integration metadata.
  identity  Manage identity tokens (login).
  packagingtools identity login [identity options]

Usage:
  packagingtools pack --project <file> --platform <windows|mac|linux> [options]
  packagingtools host --project <file> [host options]

Pack Options:
  --project <path>          Path to project definition JSON file
  --platform <name>         Target platform
  --format <value>          Requested format (repeatable)
  --configuration <value>   Build configuration (default Release)
  --output <path>           Output directory (default ./artifacts)
  --property key=value      Provider property override
  --save-project <path>     Persist updated project after run
    Remote signing properties: windows.signing.azureKeyVaultCertificate, windows.signing.azureKeyVaultUrl
    Local signing properties: windows.signing.certificatePath, windows.signing.password

Host Options:
  --project <path>                    Path to project definition JSON file
  --enable-shortcut|--disable-shortcut
  --shortcut-name <value>
  --shortcut-target <value>
  --shortcut-description <value>
  --shortcut-icon <value>
  --enable-protocol|--disable-protocol
  --protocol-name <value>
  --protocol-display-name <value>
  --protocol-command <value>
  --enable-file-association|--disable-file-association
  --file-extension <value>
  --file-progid <value>
  --file-description <value>
  --file-command <value>
  --apply                             Persist changes (default previews only)
  --save-project <path>               Optional override path when applying

Identity Login Options:
  --provider <name>        Identity provider (azuread|okta|local, default azuread)
  --scope <value>          Requested scope (repeatable)
  --require-mfa            Require MFA for the login session
  --tenant <value>         Azure AD tenant id
  --client-id <value>      Azure AD client id
  --domain <value>         Okta domain
  --username <value>       Username or UPN
  --display-name <value>   Friendly display name override
  --email <value>          Email override
  --roles <value>          Comma-separated role list
  --organization <value>   Okta organization name
  --mfa-code <value>       MFA verification code
Unknown option 'pack'.
